{{CargoRelic
|name=Tom Sawyer Adventures
|class_id=22064
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=05-22
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On May 22, 1876 AD, Mark Twain published the famous children's novel Tom Sawyer Adventures.<br>Tom Sawyer Adventures is a beloved children's book written by Mark Twain that follows the exciting journey of young Tommy and Huck. Twain weaves in references to his own childhood in Missouri to create a vivid and authentic setting. While playing in the cemetery, Tommy and Huck witness a murder and flee to a deserted island in fear. After much internal conflict, they summon the courage to testify against the killer and embark on a quest to find the treasure he left behind. Though the book didn't sell well initially, it eventually became a classic of American literature after Twain's passing.
|fame=32
|art=27
|fth=26
|civ=45
|tech=24
|ss1=Mutant Minion RUSH +1%
|ss2=Mutant Minion RUSH +2%
|ss3=Mutant Minion RUSH +3%
|ss4=Mutant Minion RUSH +5%
|ss7=Mutant Minion RUSH +5%<br>Mutant Minion RUSH +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's CIV +5
}}
